items.name: Brightens and evens skin tone.
items.desc: 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C Derivative), Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice) Root Extract, Scutellaria Baicalensis Root Extract, Polygonum Cuspidatum Root Extract, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract.

items.name: Deeply hydrates and plumps.
items.desc: Aqua, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Dipropylene Glycol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Butylene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, Lecithin, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Ceramide NP

items.name: Broad spectrum protection
items.desc: Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane (Avobenzone), Octocrylene

items.name: Protects and nourishes skin.
items.desc: Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E), Ceramide NP, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Rosa Rugosa Flower Oil, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Glyceryl Stearate, Bisabolol
